body:
https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/pull/128#issuecomment-4367941773

1. can we adopt a similar tabular style like https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/issues/90 ? 
2. can we also be more explicit about the followup message and task for the fix-pr agent? (I think we also tried to fix it previously)?

@sepo-agent /answer

comments.body:
Yes. I’d handle this as a small orchestration communication change, not a behavior rewrite.

**What I found**

- #90 already moved sub-orchestrator comments to compact transposed tables in [`.agent/src/cli/orchestrate-handoff.ts`](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/blob/main/.agent/src/cli/orchestrate-handoff.ts).
- The linked PR #128 comment is produced through the generic handoff marker formatter in [`.agent/src/handoff.ts`](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/blob/main/.agent/src/handoff.ts), so it still reads like a log: `review -> fix-pr`, round, reason.
- The fix-pr path already has plumbing for explicit context: [`.github/prompts/agent-orchestrator.md`](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/blob/main/.github/prompts/agent-orchestrator.md) asks for `handoff_context`, [`.github/workflows/agent-orchestrator.yml`](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/blob/main/.github/workflows/agent-orchestrator.yml) passes it through, and [`.github/prompts/agent-fix-pr.md`](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/blob/main/.github/prompts/agent-fix-pr.md) prioritizes it. The gap is that the visible handoff comment does not show it, and heuristic review-to-fix-pr handoffs may not have a concrete task string beyond “latest review synthesis”.

**Proposed visible format**

```md
Sepo is dispatching follow-up automation.

| Source | Next | Target | Round | Status |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| review | fix-pr | PR #128 | 6 / 10 | Dispatched |

Task for fix-pr:
Document and test the `sepo-version.json` current-working-directory fallback, or remove the fallback so missing metadata fails clearly.

Constraints:
Use the latest review synthesis action item only. Avoid optional INFO polish unless it is needed for the selected fix.

<!-- sepo-agent-handoff ... -->
```

I’d keep the hidden `sepo-agent-handoff` marker unchanged so dedupe/minimization keeps working.

**Implementation plan**

1. Reuse or move the existing Markdown table helper from [`.agent/src/cli/orchestrate-handoff.ts`](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/blob/main/.agent/src/cli/orchestrate-handoff.ts) so generic handoff comments can use the same transposed table style as #90.
2. Extend the handoff comment formatter in [`.agent/src/handoff.ts`](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/blob/main/.agent/src/handoff.ts) to accept optional `handoffContext` and render it as `Task for fix-pr` when `nextAction === "fix-pr"`.
3. Make review-to-fix-pr context more explicit:
   - In planner mode, tighten [`.github/prompts/agent-orchestrator.md`](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/blob/main/.github/prompts/agent-orchestrator.md) so `fix-pr` handoffs must include the exact finding/action item, constraints, and what to ignore.
   - For heuristic review handoffs, either pass a concise extracted action item from the review synthesis response file, or use a deterministic fallback like “Address only the latest review synthesis action items.”
4. Keep [`.github/prompts/agent-fix-pr.md`](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/blob/main/.github/prompts/agent-fix-pr.md) aligned by stating that non-empty orchestrator context is the fix-pr task, not just background.
5. Update tests in [`.agent/src/__tests__/handoff.test.ts`](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/blob/main/.agent/src/__tests__/handoff.test.ts), [`.agent/src/__tests__/orchestrate-handoff-cli.test.ts`](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/blob/main/.agent/src/__tests__/orchestrate-handoff-cli.test.ts), and [`.agent/src/__tests__/envelope.test.ts`](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/blob/main/.agent/src/__tests__/envelope.test.ts).
6. Update the orchestrator docs in [`.agent/docs/technical-details/agent-orchestrator.md`](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/blob/main/.agent/docs/technical-details/agent-orchestrator.md) to document that visible handoff comments are compact status tables plus an explicit next-task block.

No blocker questions from me. If approved, I’d implement this directly against issue #129.

Sepo automation handoff dispatched: `orchestrate` -> `implement` (round 2/10).

agent planner selected implement: Issue #129 is a small, self-contained orchestration communication change and the requester approved implementation after the prior plan.

<!-- sepo-agent-handoff state:dispatched created:1777865681569 base64:aGFuZG9mZjpzZWxmLWV2b2x2aW5nL3JlcG86MjUyOTk2NzU1NzA6b3JjaGVzdHJhdGU6MTI5OmltcGxlbWVudDoxMjk6Mg -->

**Sepo implementation finished**

- Branch: `agent/implement-issue-129/codex-25299711989`
- Pull request: https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/pull/131

Updated generic orchestration handoff comments to use compact transposed tables, derive and pass explicit fix-pr task context from review synthesis action items, and align prompts/docs. Verified with build, targeted node tests, and git diff --check.

title: Improve the orchestrator communication prompt
